message:
feat: add Module trait train/eval mode propagation, dynamic parameter/buffer registration, and buffer collection APIs

Module trait extensions:
- Add train(&self, mode: bool), eval(&self), and is_training(&self)
  default methods to the Module trait for recursive training/eval mode
  propagation through module hierarchies — train() recurses into
  named_children(), eval() delegates to train(false), is_training()
  returns true for leaves and checks all children for containers
- Add register_parameter() and register_buffer() methods with
  ModuleRegistrationError for dynamic runtime parameter/buffer
  registration (default impl returns Unsupported error)
- Add named_parameter_slots_own() and named_buffer_slots_own() for
  querying dynamically-registered parameters and buffers including
  optional (None) slots

New public APIs:
- named_buffers(module, prefix) — recursively collect all buffer tensors
  with dotted path names, mirroring PyTorch's module.named_buffers()
- named_persistent_buffers(module, prefix) — same but filtered to
  persistent-only buffers (those included in state_dict)
- buffers(module) — flat list of all buffer TensorNodeIds

ModuleRegistrationError enum:
- InvalidName { kind } — invalid registration name format
- NameConflict { name } — name collides with existing state
- Unsupported { operation } — module doesn't support dynamic registration
- is_valid_registration_name() validator: rejects empty, leading/trailing
  dots, non-alphanumeric/underscore characters in dot-separated segments

Registration helpers:
- RegisteredParameter and RegisteredBuffer internal structs with
  upsert_registered_parameter() and upsert_registered_buffer() helpers
  for idempotent insert-or-update semantics

Dropout refactor:
- Change training field from bool to Cell<bool> so train/eval/is_training
  work through &self (matching Module trait signatures)
- Remove &mut self from train()/eval() methods
- Implement Module::train() and Module::is_training() overrides
- Update all test sites to remove mut bindings for Dropout

BatchNorm1d enhancements:
- Add running_mean_buffer, running_var_buffer, num_batches_tracked_buffer
  as TensorNodeId fields backed by RefCell for interior mutability
- Add num_batches_tracked Cell<u64> counter
- Add registered_parameters and registered_buffers RefCell<Vec<...>>
  for dynamic registration support
- Pre-populate registered_buffers with running_mean, running_var, and
  num_batches_tracked as persistent buffers in constructor
- Change training field from bool to Cell<bool> for &self compatibility
- Add has_builtin_parameter_name() and has_builtin_buffer_name() guards
- Implement Module::train() and Module::is_training() overrides
- Update all test sites to remove mut bindings

BatchNorm2d refactor:
- Change training field from bool to Cell<bool>
- Update train/eval/is_training to use Cell get/set
- Implement Module::train() and Module::is_training() overrides
- Update all test sites to remove mut bindings

named_parameters() update:
- Extend to also collect named_parameter_slots_own() entries (non-None
  slots only) in addition to named_parameters_own()

New tests:
- module_eval_propagates_to_sequential_children: verifies Sequential
  containing Dropout respects eval/train mode toggle with actual
  forward pass validation (eval preserves inputs, train applies masking)
- module_eval_propagates_through_nested_containers: verifies
  Sequential > ModuleList > Sequential > Dropout recursive propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
